comment: This app helps me alot to translate and it works fine but after last update this app has disappeared from the home screen and when ever I have to translate I need to open the app from play store... I hope you will fix the bug.
key sentence: The key words: disappeared from the home screen
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
